subcodes.first_line: O thou who speakest the praise of thy Lord in this realm of existence and arena of manifestation, souls have attained unto holy stations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بثنای پروردگار در این ملک وجود و عرصه شهود نفوسی بمقامات قدسیه نائل و
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @development of capacity and readiness, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
